cap_note: no auto-mediated paid leg in this script; recording pays via the agent's own key

census.method: auto report --task ticket-triage (canonical determinism report, parsed)
census.raw_report:
determinism report — task "ticket-triage" (80 traces)
effectful spans: 80 (structural spans excluded: 80)
witnessed (signature observed >=2 across runs): 80 of 80 spans
  deterministic: 80 spans (100.0% of witnessed)
  divergent:     0 spans
  unwitnessed:   0 spans — no claim made
time-weighted deterministic fraction of witnessed: 100.0%
by kind:
  model_call: 80 spans — 80 deterministic, 0 divergent, 0 unwitnessed
(fractions cover witnessed spans only; nothing is extrapolated)

frontier_baseline.source: recorded span duration_ms + reserved attrs; recorded = baseline (DESIGN.md); percentiles nearest-rank, script-side

artifact_rung: distill (enum refused, as the DSL predicts; refusal recorded verbatim)

enum_v1.refusal_verbatim: auto compile: synthesis budget exhausted (300000 state(s), depth 8) — no fitting program in the v0 DSL; supply --module (hand-assisted) or wait for a richer search
enum_v1.cmd: target/release/auto compile --contract evals/bench/bench-f1.contract.toml --store target/bench/f1.db --synth enum --guard-field ticket --guard-alpha-milli 1 --divergent-pick most-common --out paper/evidence/bench\f1-triage-v1.cbin --runs-dir evals/runs

distill_v1.cmd: target/release/auto distill --contract evals/bench/bench-f1.contract.toml --store target/bench/f1.db --trainer python crates/auto-passes/trainer/tree_train.py --model-kind tree --input-field ticket --holdout 0 --seed 0 --divergent-pick most-common --guard-alpha-milli 1 --runs-dir evals/runs --out paper/evidence/bench\f1-triage-v1.cbin

distill_v2.cmd: target/release/auto distill --contract evals/bench/bench-f1.contract.toml --store target/bench/f1.db --trainer python crates/auto-passes/trainer/tree_train.py --model-kind tree --input-field ticket --holdout 0 --seed 0 --divergent-pick most-common --guard-alpha-milli 1 --runs-dir evals/runs --guard-embedding --out paper/evidence/bench\f1-triage-v2.cbin

latency_probe.input_ticket: I was charged twice for my subscription this month, please refund the duplicate payment.
latency_probe.note: one-shot `auto run` process wall-clock incl. spawn + wasm compile (deployment-shaped, F6 convention); 1 unmeasured warmup then 20 measured; resident/in-process floors measured elsewhere (paper/log.md waves 6/9/10)

h4_probes.accounting: false-abstain = heldout abstained; false-proceed = ood answered (the cardinal failure)

deviations: enum rung expected to refuse (v0 DSL has no input-equality branching; F6 README) — artifacts for latency/H4 come from the distill rung unless enum emitted; see compile.*

bench-f1.contract.toml used instead of evals/ticket-triage/triage.contract.toml: the wave-3 contract's feature example input lies OUTSIDE the first-40 bench window and its examples were filled from a different (2026-07-04) store; see the contract header
